_publications._publicationTitle: Suppression of proliferation of two independent NF1 malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor cell lines by the pan-ErbB inhibitor CI-1033.

_contextSnippet: Treatment of both NF1 MPNST cell lines with 1 μM CI-1033 effectively suppressed EGF-induced phosphorylation of EGFR at Tyr1068, and ErbB2 at Tyr1221/1222
details: 1 μM effectively suppressed EGF-induced phosphorylation of EGFR at Tyr1068, ErbB2 at Tyr1221/1222, and ERK activation
